message:
Running command: # DRT iter 0: 20% complete with 16495 violations at 8 min.
# This is normal - violations start high and decrease as routing converges.
# OR at 48% memory (3.9GB) - DRT is loading routing data.
# Continue monitoring with 15-min polls.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=824793

for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  sleep 900

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_MTIME=$(stat -c%y "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | cut -c12-19)
  OR_MEM=$(ps aux | grep "openroad\b" | grep -v bash | grep -v grep | awk '{print $4}' | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  DRT=$(grep "violations\|iteration\|Completing\|Start [0-9]*th" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -3 | tr '\n' '|' | head -c 120)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) OR=${OR_MEM}%mem log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) mtime=$LOG_MTIME"
  [ -n "$DRT" ] && echo "  DRT: $DRT"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done

LR_PID=824793

  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_MTIME=$(stat -c%y "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | cut -c12-19)
  OR_MEM=$(ps aux | grep "openroad\b" | grep -v bash | grep -v grep | awk '{print $4}' | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  DRT=$(grep "violations\|Completing\|Start [0-9]*th" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -4 | tr '\n' '|' | head -c 140)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) OR=${OR_MEM}%mem log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) mtime=$LOG_MTIME"
  [ -n "$DRT" ] && echo "  DRT: $DRT"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done

message:
Running command: # DRT iter 0: 30% complete, 35070 violations at 4:20 elapsed.
# Memory at 4.2GB (54%). Violations growing - this is normal for iter 0 (initial routing).
# Violations will peak around 60-70% then decrease.
# At 10 min per 10% = 100 min for iter 0. Subsequent iters shorter.
# Monitor with 15-min polls.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=824793

for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  sleep 900

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_MTIME=$(stat -c%y "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | cut -c12-19)
  OR_MEM=$(ps aux | grep "openroad\b" | grep -v bash | grep -v grep | awk '{print $4}' | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  DRT=$(grep "violations\|Completing\|Start [0-9]*th" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -3 | tr '\n' '|' | head -c 120)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) OR=${OR_MEM}%mem log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) mtime=$LOG_MTIME"
  [ -n "$DRT" ] && echo "  DRT: $DRT"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done
